steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that guard cells regulate carbon dioxide intake, then notes they also regulate water loss. This is a second, additional function of the same cells.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The logical relationship is addition. The blank needs a transition signaling that regulating water loss is another function alongside regulating CO₂.
  • Choice A — "Previously,": signals something happened earlier in time, but no time sequence is being described here, so fails. ✗
  • Choice B — "Additionally,": signals a second related point, fitting the second function of guard cells, so fits. ✓
  • Choice C — "In conclusion,": signals a final summary of an argument, but the passage isn't wrapping up an argument, so fails. ✗
  • Choice D — "Instead,": signals substitution or contrast—implying the second function replaces the first—but both functions coexist, so fails. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
